title: clematis alpina var. tenuiloba
intro: Clematis alpina var. tenuiloba is a perennial flowering plant species, commonly known as the dwarf alpine clematis or tenuiloba, characterized by its delicate white, bell-shaped flowers and slender foliage. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly for its diuretic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of clematis alpina var. tenuiloba include reducing blood pressure, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots, leaves, and stems are used separately or combined with other herbs to create remedies.
